message:
fix(stats): Suppress clippy manual_checked_ops warnings

Add clippy::manual_checked_ops to allow attributes for format_length_distribution
and format_likes_histogram functions. The manual division guards are intentional
since max_count can be 0 if all bucket counts are 0 (unwrap_or(1) only handles
empty iterators, not the case where all counts are zero).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
